_description: Database MCP server configurations. Copy the relevant section into your .mcp.json

setup_commands.postgresql: claude-workspace mcp add postgres --scope local --api-key DATABASE_URL -- npx -y @bytebase/dbhub
setup_commands.mysql: claude-workspace mcp add mysql --scope local --api-key DATABASE_URL -- npx -y @bytebase/dbhub
setup_commands.sqlite: claude-workspace mcp add sqlite --scope local -- npx -y @anthropic/claude-code-sqlite-server ./db.sqlite

notes.postgresql: Recommended scope: local (connection string is environment-specific and contains credentials). You will be prompted to enter DATABASE_URL securely (e.g., postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/db)
notes.mysql: Recommended scope: local (connection string is environment-specific and contains credentials). You will be prompted to enter DATABASE_URL securely (e.g., mysql://user:pass@host:3306/db)
notes.sqlite: Recommended scope: local (file path is personal to your machine). No API key needed - SQLite uses a local file path
